title: Podman hangs on: podman run -it --rm ...
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

`podman run --interactive --tty --rm yelgeb/inselelo:0.0.27 bash` delivers the shell prompt then hangs.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Execute
`strace -ostrace.log podman run --interactive --tty --rm yelgeb/inselelo:0.0.27 bash`

**Describe the results you received:**

The `strace.log` is attached: [strace.zip](https://github.com/containers/libpod/files/4777322/strace.zip)

```bash
$ strace -ostrace.log podman run --interactive --tty --rm yelgeb/inselelo:0.0.27 bash
root@6adf51051ce9:/#
```

The user input `ls` is not accepted.  No error is thrown.
 
**Describe the results you expected:**

Directory listing.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

Happens always.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
$ podman version
Version:            1.9.3
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.10.1
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```

  gitCommit: ""

  cpus: 2
  distribution:

  eventLogger: file
  hostname: desktop.local.lan
  idMappings:
    gidmap:
    - container_id: 0

      size: 1

      host_id: 100000
      size: 65536
    uidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 1000
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 100000
      size: 65536
  kernel: 5.3.0-40-generic
  memFree: 932093952
  memTotal: 16652148736
  ociRuntime:
    name: runc
    package: 'containerd.io: /usr/bin/runc'
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: |-
      runc version 1.0.0-rc10
      commit: dc9208a3303feef5b3839f4323d9beb36df0a9dd

  os: linux

  slirp4netns:
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
$ apt list podman
Listing... Done
podman/unknown,now 1.9.3~1 amd64 [installe
d]
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Physical.

comments.body:
Can you upload your image to DockerHub? I have no problem testing with other images
```
# podman   run -ti --rm  docker.io/library/nginx:alpine sh
Trying to pull docker.io/library/nginx:alpine...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob cbdbe7a5bc2a skipped: already exists  
Copying blob 10c113fb0c77 done  
Copying blob 262f9908119d done  
Copying blob c4a057508f96 done  
Copying blob 9ba64393807b done  
Copying config 7d0cdcc60a done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
/ # ls
bin                   docker-entrypoint.d   etc                   lib                   mnt                   proc                  run                   srv                   tmp                   var
dev                   docker-entrypoint.sh  home                  media                 opt                   root                  sbin                  sys                   usr
```
You're not redirecting anything in the container, right? E.g. `podman run -t -i fedora bash < echo ls`
@mheon correct, no redirection. I've moved on and redesigned our workflow.  If the strace suffices I'll leave to you to reopen.
